root.name: Create a text box on slide 2 with the phrase 'Important Note' positioned in the bottom right corner
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent accurately created a text box containing 'Important Note' on slide 2 and positioned it correctly, with no unnecessary changes.

children.name: Text Box Creation on Slide 2
children.description: Checks that a new text box was added on slide 2.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Use python-pptx to check slide 2 for a new text box
    from pptx import Presentation
    prs = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    slide = prs.slides[1]  # slides are 0-indexed
    textboxes = [shape for shape in slide.shapes if shape.has_text_frame and shape.shape_type == 17]  # 17: MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE (common for textboxes)
    # Check if any textbox contains 'Important Note'
    found = False
    for shape in textboxes:
        if 'Important Note' in shape.text:
            found = True
            break
    if found:
        reason = "Text box with 'Important Note' found on slide 2."
        score = 1.0
    else:
        reason = "Text box with 'Important Note' not found on slide 2."
        score = 0.0
    return reason, score

children.name: Text Content Accuracy
children.description: Checks that the text box contains exactly the phrase 'Important Note'.

children.name: Positioning of Text Box
children.description: Evaluates whether the text box is located in the bottom right corner of slide 2.

children.name: No Unnecessary Changes
children.description: Checks that no extraneous slides, elements, animations, or transitions were added, removed, or modified except for the intended text box on slide 2.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Only allow one new element (the text box) on slide 2, and no other diffs
    # We'll check ppt_diff for slides, animations, transitions
    extraneous = False
    reason_list = []
    # Slides
    if ppt_diff.added_slides or ppt_diff.removed_slides:
        extraneous = True
        reason_list.append('Slides added or removed.')
    # Animations or transitions
    if ppt_diff.added_animations or ppt_diff.removed_animations or ppt_diff.modified_animations:
        extraneous = True
        reason_list.append('Animations changed.')
    if ppt_diff.added_transitions or ppt_diff.removed_transitions or ppt_diff.modified_transitions:
        extraneous = True
        reason_list.append('Transitions changed.')
    # Slide 2 elements: allow only one extra element
    # We'll count element count difference
    from pptx import Presentation
    orig_prs = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    mod_prs = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    orig_elems = len(orig_prs.slides[1].shapes)
    mod_elems = len(mod_prs.slides[1].shapes)
    if mod_elems - orig_elems > 1:
        extraneous = True
        reason_list.append('More than one element added to slide 2.')
    # If anything extraneous, score 0
    if extraneous:
        return f"Extraneous change(s): {'; '.join(reason_list)}", 0.0
    return "No extraneous changes detected.", 1.0

metadata.task: Create a text box on slide 2 with the phrase 'Important Note' and position it in the bottom right corner of the slide
